entry_group_id.description: The id of the entry group to create. The id must begin with a letter or underscore, contain only English letters, numbers and underscores, and be at most 64 characters.

display_name.description: A short name to identify the entry group, for example, "analytics data - jan 2011".

description.description: Entry group description, which can consist of several sentences or paragraphs that describe entry group contents.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
